name: steam-vdf

metadata.name: steam-vdf
metadata.summary: Do fun things with Steam VDF data files

documentation:
# Steam VDF Tool

A command-line utility for managing Steam library data, non-Steam game shortcuts, and analyzing Steam storage usage.

## Features

- Display Steam library information and user accounts
- List and manage non-Steam game shortcuts
- Analyze storage usage of Steam and non-Steam directories
- Export VDF files to JSON format (for valid types)
- Binary VDF file support
- Restart Steam service
- Analyze storage of Steam and Non-Steam games

## Installation

```
pip install steam-vdf
```

## Usage

```
steam-vdf --help
```

Some commands (such as info), have additional help information:
```
steam-vdf info --help
```

## Development

### Install


Install a local version with:
```
# Install using pipenv (recommended)
pipenv install --dev
pipenv shell
```

### Build docs
```
pipenv run python setup.py build_sphinx
```

modules.name: steam_vdf.cli
documentation: !/usr/bin/env python

functions.name: steam_vdf.cli.parse_arguments
documentation: Parse command line arguments

functions.name: steam_vdf.utils.complete_path
documentation: Tab completion function for file paths

functions.name: steam_vdf.utils.is_steam_running
documentation: Check if Steam process is running

functions.name: steam_vdf.utils.restart_steam
documentation:
Restart Steam and wait for it to fully start up
Returns True if successful, False otherwise

functions.name: steam_vdf.utils.setup_logging
documentation:
Configure logging for the application.
Args:
    debug (bool): If True, sets logging level to DEBUG, otherwise INFO

functions.name: steam_vdf.utils.steam64_to_steam32
documentation: Convert Steam64 ID to Steam32 ID

functions.name: steam_vdf.utils.steam32_to_steam64
documentation: Convert Steam32 ID to Steam64 ID

functions.name: steam_vdf.utils.prompt_path
documentation: Prompt for a path with autocompletion

functions.name: steam_vdf.utils.view_vdf
documentation:
View the contents of a VDF file
Args:
    vdf_file (str): Path to the VDF file
    output_type (str): Type of output (json or raw)

functions.name: steam_vdf.utils.get_steam_client_version
documentation:
Get Steam client version from manifest file.
Returns a tuple of (version, is_beta, timestamp)

functions.name: steam_vdf.utils.find_steam_libraries
documentation:
Find Steam libraries based on the provided arguments
Args:
    args: Parsed command-line arguments
Returns:
    list: List of Steam library paths

functions.name: steam_vdf.utils.display_steam_info
documentation: Display Steam library and account information

functions.name: steam_vdf.storage.get_non_steam_usage
documentation: Get sizes of directories on same drive as Steam, excluding Steam directory

modules.name: steam_vdf.users
documentation: !/usr/bin/env python

functions.name: steam_vdf.users.dump_vdf_to_json
documentation:
Dump VDF data to JSON file in /tmp directory
The JSON filename will include the source directory (steamapps or config)

functions.name: steam_vdf.users.delete_shortcut
documentation: Delete an existing shortcut after selecting user and shortcut

functions.name: steam_vdf.users.list_shortcuts
documentation: List existing non-Steam game shortcuts

functions.name: steam_vdf.users.get_steam_user_names
documentation:
Get Steam account names from both loginusers.vdf and config.vdf
Returns a dictionary mapping user IDs to account names

functions.name: steam_vdf.users.add_shortcut_entry
documentation: Add a new shortcut entry

functions.name: steam_vdf.users.add_shortcut_to_shortcuts
documentation: Add a new shortcut entry to the shortcuts structure

functions.name: steam_vdf.users.load_shortcuts_file
documentation: Load shortcuts.vdf file using binary mode

functions.name: steam_vdf.users.save_shortcuts
documentation: Save the shortcuts back to the VDF file

functions.name: steam_vdf.users.find_steam_library
documentation:
Find the Steam library location based on the operating system.
Returns the path to the Steam library or None if not found.

functions.name: steam_vdf.users.find_steam_library_folders
documentation:
Find all Steam library folders including additional library folders.
Returns a list of paths to all found Steam libraries.

functions.name: steam_vdf.users.choose_library
documentation:
Prompt user to choose a Steam library from the available options.
Returns the chosen library path or None if no valid selection is made.
